title.en: As a result, the replicating bodies do not inte...

content.en:
Ye Tian swallowed these secret medicines, and the will of the Origin Realm began to gradually sublimate.

However, he also found that his Origin Realm Will seemed to be mixed with inexplicable things, making the Origin Realm Will become unrefined, but as long as the sublimation was successful, it would be enough.

Ye Tian will all copy the body separately, and they do not share their strength with each other.

As a result, the replicating bodies do not interfere with each other.

As time passed, Ye Tian's copy body Origin Realm Will was finally sublimated, breaking the Origin Realm Will.

If he chooses to break away from his physical body, the will of the Origin Realm can be integrated into the Origin of the Land of Eternity and transformed into an Origin Dao Ancestor.

He wouldn't, though.

......

"Now, my Origin Realm will has been sublimated and broken the boundaries, and I can proceed to the next step of research, combining the reincarnation Haotian body, the reincarnation Haotian Origin, and the Origin Realm will, combining the three aspects to find a balance. "

Ye Tian worked hard to study this aspect.

But it is very difficult to succeed in research.

However, Ye Tian is still ready to spend a long time researching, he is not afraid of wasting time, as long as there is harvest and hope, he is ready to continue researching.

The years passed.

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

Before you know it, 10 million primeval years have passed.

After such a long period of research, Ye Tian did not choose to give up, because he did have gains, and the gains were not small, and he saw hope for success.

"The body of reincarnation of Haotian, the origin of reincarnation of Haotian, and the will of the origin realm that breaks the boundary, the three aspects can indeed form a balance, I have maintained the balance for a moment before, but if you want to completely stabilize the balance, you need a substance to stabilize. "

He was going to find this substance and create a method to combine it with a unique secret medicine to complete the balance.

Thereupon.

In the following days, Ye Tian walked all over the land of eternity, and he was constantly looking for this substance in the ruins of reincarnation, but it was obviously difficult to find this substance, and he needed to have enough patience.

......

The ruins of reincarnation.

A dark shard of earth.

Ye Tian came here unintentionally, and he didn't have much hope for this place, but he still walked slowly, looking for substances that were useful for stabilizing the balance.

Suddenly.

He saw a piece of soil, which exuded a strange smell that seemed extraordinary.

He walked over, grabbed some soil, and pulled out a black substance from it.

"This substance ......"

When he saw this black substance, he seemed to have some sense, as if this thing was useful to him.

Thereupon.

He took the substances and began to study them to see if they would be useful for his own stable balance.

After some time.

"It's really useful!"

Ye Tian was excited.

But this one substance is not enough, it also needs some material resources, and it is necessary to refine a unique secret medicine with this substance.

It will take a long time to study, but at least there is hope.

"Any path and secret medicine requires the sacrifice and research of many Origin Upper Realm Overlords to have any hope of success, and most of them have flaws, how can it be so easy to research the perfect path!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to study, anyway, there are a lot of this kind of black substance, and there is no shortage of it.

He can rest assured that he will research and waste with confidence.

In this way, hundreds of thousands of primeval epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian used this black substance and a variety of resource materials to make a first version of the secret medicine, which can maintain the balance for a long time, but it still has flaws and will damage the foundation.

Thereupon.

He needs to be perfected again.

Of course, he has at least succeeded in the first step now, and it will definitely be much easier later.

And just like that, millions of primeval epochs have passed.

This time, the secret medicine he created was perfect, using a lot of precious resources, and its value was unimaginable.

The secret medicine created this time can successfully stabilize the balance, and the method he created is about to succeed.

This method can allow him to reincarnate Haotian Body, Reincarnation Haotian Origin, and Origin Realm Will to merge together and turn into a new kind of power, which can allow him to progress on the three paths without being restricted.

More than six million years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already completely created this method, and it was extremely perfect, and as for the secret medicine, it was even further improved.

It can be said that Ye Tian has now thoroughly researched the fourth path.

Next, it's time to verify.

......

"The next step is to start breaking through!"

Ye Tian took out the secret medicine, this secret medicine was called the three-source secret medicine by him, which could maintain balance and have the effect of assisting breakthroughs, but if you want to really break through, the success rate is still not high.

However, he also didn't want to spend hundreds of millions of primeval years researching resources with better success rates, that would be a waste of time.

Even if the success rate is not high, as long as you try again and again, there must be a breakthrough once, and that is enough.

Soon.

Ye Tian began the first impact.

The three powers gradually merged with the help of the three-source secret medicine, and then began to break through the shackles of the boundary.

The body of reincarnation Haotian was successfully awakened, but the origin of the other side did not break the boundary in time, causing the balance to be broken and the first cultivation failed.

Subsequently.

He made another replica and began a second breakthrough.

But the second time it still failed.

Even if the secret medicine can be stabilized and balanced, the success rate is too low, and the difficulty of breaking through in this way is more than a hundred times that of other Origin Upper Realm Overlords!

Three times!

Ten times!

Twenty times!

Ye Tian failed again and again, but each failure would bring him closer to the next success.

Years passed, and after a long time, Ye Tian had already started his hundredth attempt.

After failing so many times, a lot of resources were consumed, but fortunately, he had been looking for resources for a long time and collecting a huge amount of resources, otherwise he would really not be able to hold on.

One hundred and sixty-second attempt.

This time.

The Reincarnation Haotian Body, the Reincarnation Haotian Origin, and the Origin Realm Will all broke through at the same time, and with the help of the Three Origin Secret Medicine, these three forces fused together and were always in a state of balance.

Soon.

A special power was born, which made Ye Tian's body, origin, and will skyrocket, and there was no conflict.

This special power was named by Ye Tian as the power of reincarnation balance.

This is the first breakthrough, if the more breakthroughs, the more power of fusion, after nine times, you can definitely turn all the power into one, and the strength will be extremely terrifying!
